Author: Nainaiowo
Name: Better Deaths
Description: Records party deaths with pull grouping, fatal events, active statuses, and recent action timelines.
Changelog:
Added Walled detection for environment-source deaths such as death walls and jump-offs.
Added broader mitigation tracking for secondary and granted effects, including Desperate Measures and other shield, regen, and healing-received effects.
Moved the 10-second lead-up into the selected death row.
The 10s lead-up container can now be resized by dragging its bottom edge.
Summary now keeps active mitigations/debuffs at death and Expired Mits directly with the death context.
Added a Customize option to hide the Example tab.
Forsaken Towers should draw more consistently (hopefully).
